Off Calendar Sep-28-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-14-2022 Continued To Sep-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Continued To Sep-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Francisco Gutierrez, via Zoom, for Dianna Lopez, Personal Representative.

Counsel advises that he has an accounting and a pdf of an Inventory and Appraisal (I&A). Counsel reports that he intends to file the I&A and a petition for final distribution and asks for a continuance of six to eight weeks.

The matter is continued to Sep-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Francisco Gutierrez, via Zoom, for Dianna Lopez, Administrator.

Counsel reports that there had been a conflict with the probate referee initially assigned to this matter which required an ex parte application to replace them, and the Inventory and Appraisal is currently with the newly appointed probate referee and will file it as soon as possible. Counsel advises that the matter should close soon, and that a petition should be filed by the next calling of this matter, if a continuance is granted.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jul-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Mar-07-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey, specially appearing for Francisco Gutierrez, for Dianna Lopez, Personal Representative.

Ms. Ebey advises the court that she is specially appearing for Mr. Gutierrez as he is unable to appear due to a personal matter. Ms. Ebey reports that there has been a delay caused by Mr. Gutierrez having a conflict with the assigned probate referee and that a request for the appointment of a new probate referee will be filed soon.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Mar-07-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Charlene P. Kiesselbach. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-01-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Francisco Gutierrez, Esq., counsel for Diana Lopez, Petitioner (appearing by video conferencing).

After brief discussion and review of the pleadings and representation from Mr. Gutierrez that no objections has been filed or received, the Court finds sufficient evidence to support the admission of the holographic will and admits into probate the will dated February 15, 2020. The remainder of the Petition is taken under submission pending review of the Order. The Court otherwise sets status of closing the estate for December 6, 2021 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
